title: mRNA therapeutics: Transforming medicine through innovation in design, delivery, and disease treatment
source: Ige et al., Molecular Therapy Nucleic Acids, 2025

L2: mRNA therapeutics have revolutionized medicine following COVID-19 vaccine success
Innovations in mRNA design, delivery systems, and disease applications are expanding the therapeutic landscape
L3: Comprehensive review of mRNA therapeutic technologies covering design innovations, lipid nanoparticle delivery systems, and expanding applications beyond vaccines into cancer immunotherapy, protein replacement, and gene editing
